claim: Largelexicon adds Qamus-authored candidate tooling; not live Qamus and not arbitrary-text certification.

phases.P0: claim boundary, source ledger, artifact freshness, branch isolation
phases.P1: source inventory plus lemma/form/stem sample generation
phases.P2: opt-in largelexicon parser/analyzer path and parser validation
phases.P3: Mode A all visible qword worklist, skill/curriculum/tutor backfill

executor_boundary: Qamus live deployment, readback, health, rollback, and tranche closure remain executor-owned.
